//: Read-only EC2 cluster MCP endpoints behind the dd-remote-gateway. VS Code prompts once for the token and stores it in its secret storage. See mcp/README.md for the TLS CA (NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS) step.

inputs.description: DD read-only MCP bearer token (AWS dd/remote-dev/mcp-gateway-token : MCP_READONLY_TOKEN)
